No xcsh context configured.

Learn more about [F5 Distributed Cloud](https://www.f5.com/cloud).

chat.xcsh.description: Ask about F5 Distributed Cloud resources, configuration, and troubleshooting via xcsh
chat.xcsh.command.status: Show xcsh integration health and connection status
chat.xcsh.command.context: Show active xcsh context details (tenant, namespace, API URL)
chat.xcsh.command.resources: List resources in the current namespace
chat.xcsh.disambiguation.networking: Questions about F5 Distributed Cloud networking, load balancers, origin pools, routes, DNS, CDN, virtual hosts, and HTTP load balancer configuration
chat.xcsh.disambiguation.security: Questions about F5 Distributed Cloud security, WAF policies, service policies, DDoS protection, bot defense, API security, and application firewall configuration
chat.xcsh.disambiguation.infrastructure: Questions about F5 Distributed Cloud sites, site health, cloud connectors, network connectors, fleet management, and infrastructure status
